_meta.title: Reference-to-Video Multi-Model Comparison Pipeline
_meta.description: PostGrad#17: 同一参考图 → 多模型 Ref2V 并行对比工作流 (Wan 2.6 Flash + Kling O3 + Seedance)
_meta.author: PostGrad#17 Learning Session
architecture_notes: 共享输入层: 同一张参考图 + 统一 prompt
三路并行: Wan 2.6 Flash Ref2V / Kling O3 Ref2V / Seedance Lite Ref2V
用途: 模型选型评估 / A-B-C测试 / 质量-成本权衡分析

_comment_branch_a_note: 最低成本方案 — 30fps + 原生音频, 75s 生成

inputs.prompt: The lobster samurai walks through a misty bamboo forest at dawn, katana sheathed at its side, each step deliberate and powerful, mist parting before it, golden sunlight filtering through bamboo, cinematic tracking shot

_meta.title: Branch A: Save Wan 2.6 Flash Output

_comment_branch_b: ========== BRANCH B: Kling O3 Std Ref2V (¥0.50) ==========
_comment_branch_b_note: 最高质量方案 — 7图引用 + 声音克隆 + 最强运动理解

inputs.prompt: The lobster samurai walks through a misty bamboo forest at dawn, katana sheathed at its side, each step deliberate and powerful, mist parting before it, golden sunlight filtering through bamboo, cinematic tracking shot

_meta.title: Branch B: Kling O3 Std Ref2V
Branch B: Save Kling O3 Output

_comment_branch_c: ========== BRANCH C: Seedance V1 Lite Ref2V (¥0.15) ==========
_comment_branch_c_note: 极致性价比方案 — Pro 半价, 24fps, 快速迭代首选

inputs.prompt: The lobster samurai walks through a misty bamboo forest at dawn, katana sheathed at its side, each step deliberate and powerful, mist parting before it, golden sunlight filtering through bamboo, cinematic tracking shot

_meta.title: Branch C: Seedance V1 Lite Ref2V
Branch C: Save Seedance Lite Output

_comment_pipeline_notes.execution_pattern: Fan-out from shared LoadImage → 3 parallel API branches → 3 independent saves
comfyui_execution_behavior: ComfyUI 的 topological sort 会识别三条独立分支
默认串行执行（单 GPU/单 API），但无数据依赖可安全并行
Partner Nodes 的 PollingOperation 是异步的 — 提交后 poll 等待
三个分支总等待时间 ≈ max(75s, 150s, 60s) = ~150s（如能并行）

cost_comparison.kling_o3_std: ¥0.50 — 最强质量, 24fps, 最好ID保持

selection_guidance.budget_priority: Seedance Lite (¥0.15) > Wan Flash (¥0.20) > Kling O3 (¥0.50)
selection_guidance.quality_priority: Kling O3 > Wan Flash ≈ Seedance Lite
selection_guidance.speed_priority: Seedance Lite (~60s) > Wan Flash (~75s) > Kling O3 (~150s)
selection_guidance.audio_needed: Wan Flash (原生30fps+audio) > Kling O3 (需额外V2A)
selection_guidance.recommendation: 快速迭代用 Seedance Lite → 确定方向后用 Kling O3 出片
